if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND h.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND h.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdhProdSkuStockHist :: selectById */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , cd_ssc.code_label AS chg_reason_cd_nm FROM pdh_prod_sku_stock_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = h.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ssc ON cd_ssc.code_grp = 'SKU_STOCK_CHG' AND cd_ssc.code_value = h.chg_reason_cd WHERE h.hist_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdhProdSkuStockHist :: selectList */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , cd_ssc.code_label AS chg_reason_cd_nm FROM pdh_prod_sku_stock_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = h.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ssc ON cd_ssc.code_grp = 'SKU_STOCK_CHG' AND cd_ssc.code_value = h.chg_reason_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdhProdSkuStockHist :: selectPageList */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm , cd_ssc.code_label AS chg_reason_cd_nm FROM pdh_prod_sku_stock_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = h.prod_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ssc ON cd_ssc.code_grp = 'SKU_STOCK_CHG' AND cd_ssc.code_value = h.chg_reason_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(h.*) /* base.ec.pd :: PdhProdSkuStockHist :: selectPageCount */ FROM pdh_prod_sku_stock_hist h
